name: C/p Turkey Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3½ or 4-quart crockery cooker, stir together barbecue sauce, apple jelly, tapioca, and vinegar. Cover; cook on high-heat setting while preparing meatballs.
2. In a large bowl, combine egg, bread crumbs, milk, and garlic salt. Add ground turkey and mix well. Shape into 1/2 to 3/4-inch meatballs.
3. Spray a 12-inch non-stick skillet with vegetable spray; add meatballs and brown on all sides over medium heat. Drain the meatballs.
4. Add the meatballs to the crockery cooker; stir gently. Cover; cook on high-heat setting for 1½ to 2 hours.
5. Makes 30 meatballs. For a 5 or 6-quart crockpot, double all ingredients and prepare as directed. This yields 60 meatballs.
